speaker: speaker1
text: You received a letter in the mail .

speaker: speaker2
text: I think it ’ s my acceptance letter from NYU .

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to know what it says .

speaker: speaker2
text: I really wanted to get into NYU .

speaker: speaker1
text: I am really sorry to hear that .

speaker: speaker2
text: It ’ s okay . I ’ m still waiting to hear from UCLA anyway .
